query:
SELECT up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines, up.offerCategories, up.industries, up.repType, up.buyerRoles, up.stageTiming, up.customerTypes
FROM userProfiles up
INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = up.userId
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Brett%' OR u.name LIKE '%Hansen%'
LIMIT 1;
